3316410.name: Otherwise
3316410.description:
About this game

Welcome to a unique world!"Otherwise" is an exciting survival game filled with secrets and dangers.Here you can explore mysterious locations and encounter many monsters living in this universe.Do your best and get out of the depths of darkness!

                                                          Explore 

Get resources to create powerful weapons and protective armor that will help you in battles with enemies!

                                                     Diverse biomes

Explore different biomes such as forests, deserts, mountainous areas and dungeons. Each biome offers unique resources, monsters, and climatic conditions, which requires players to adapt.

                                                    Pumping system

Develop your character by increasing the level, discovering new recipes for crafting and exploring the lands in search of unique items. Each choice affects your style of play.

                                                  Elements of survival

Players need to monitor their health and hunger, which adds realism and requires careful planning.

                                                        Unique events

Random events occur in the game, such as enemy attacks, natural disasters, or the discovery of rare resources, which adds elements of surprise and variety.

                                            Diversity of flora and fauna

These islands are inhabited by magical creatures, strange creatures and even things that contradict the laws of physics. Unleash your imagination!

These aspects make "Otherwise" not only a survival game, but also a real adventure filled with discoveries, challenges and opportunities for creativity. Each game session offers a unique experience!!
